title: Release Gates, Migration, Canary, Kill Switch, Recovery, and Defense · Program Forensics
summary: A preserved agent trajectory contains one plausible model, schema, tool, authority, state, loop, memory, concurrency, injection, evaluation, telemetry, deployment, or recovery defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in production agent release and residual-risk defense and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, a…
objectives: Require schema, unit, trajectory, safety, privacy, accessibility, compatibility, load, cost, deployment, migration, rollback, recovery, and review evidence before release.
Diff model, API, SDK, ADK, schema, safety, tool, token, state, and deprecation behavior against versioned fixtures and representative evals.
Canary immutable candidates against task, safety, tool, refusal, latency, cost, and user signals with predeclared abort and state-aware rollback.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Production Defense
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-production-defense-pnlv4h" that uses case 6293 to defend model and SDK migration, evaluation, security, approvals, capacity, canary, rollback, kill switch, recovery, support, and residual risk. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Production Defense.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Production Defense into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Production Defense, keep Production Defense connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-production-defense-pnlv4h
# Competency: agentpy-production-defense.
# Case 6293: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: inject cancellation, retry, repeated-call, checkpoint, or replay failure and recover without duplicate effects.
def evidence_agentpy_production_defense_pnlv4h(release_gates: int = 18, passed_gates: int = 18, rehearsed_incidents: int = 10, open_critical_findings: int = 0, kill_switch_seconds: int = 20) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_pnlv4h = "pnlv4h-h4vlnp-6293"
    assert evidence_variant_pnlv4h
    evidence_axes_pnlv4h = (
        "authoritypnlv4h",
        "interaction6293",
        "toolh4vlnp",
        "statepnlv4h6293",
        "evaluation6293pnlv4h",
        "recoveryh4vlnp6293",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_pnlv4h)) == 6
    if release_gates < 14 or passed_gates < 0:
        return False, passed_gates, "release-depth"
    if passed_gates != release_gates:
        return False, passed_gates, "failed-release-gate"
    if rehearsed_incidents < 8 or open_critical_findings > 0:
        return False, open_critical_findings, "incident-readiness"
    if kill_switch_seconds < 0 or kill_switch_seconds > 60:
        return False, kill_switch_seconds, "kill-switch-budget"
    assert passed_gates == release_gates and open_critical_findings == 0
    return True, passed_gates, "defensible-agent-production"
